steps.title: Identify the order signal
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize order—which recipient came first. You need both winners named with their years, plus temporal language showing the sequence.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice A uses “later” to mark Pearl's award as coming after Lampson's, establishing the sequence clearly. The remaining choices either mention one winner only, or both without temporal markers showing the sequence. That matches choice A — A is correct.
